title: Callionia canadensis

The classification of Callionia canadensis is used in botanical and horticultural contexts to identify and distinguish it from other related species.
uses: Callionia canadensis, also known as the Purple Poppy Mallow, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
